name: AARC River Rules Rally Route Trainer
note: Distances and geometry are coaching-oriented approximations for training, not navigation authority.

packs.name: Argo Turn Drill
packs.summary: Dock to Argo turn box and back. Mixed users, weeds, and a clean stop-cross-clear turn.
briefing: Depart from the AARC dock and settle immediately into the right side of traffic for your direction of travel.
Expect swimmers and mixed public traffic near the dock and around Argo recreation areas.
At the turn box upstream of Argo Dam: stop, cross the river, turn back, and clear the area before rowing home.

features.title: AARC Dock
features.brief: Launch cleanly and build the stay-right habit right away.

features.title: Mixed-user zone
features.brief: Swimmers and paddlers near the dock can be hard to predict. Look early and give room.

features.title: Big bend shoreline weeds
features.brief: Stay right, but do not hug the bank where weeds collect.

features.title: Argo recreation zone
features.brief: Traffic gets denser here. Slow slightly, look more often, and stay predictable.

features.title: Argo turn box
features.brief: Approach on the right, stop, cross, then turn back upstream toward the dock.

hazards.title: Swimmers near the dock
hazards.brief: Leave extra room on the dock-side shoreline.

hazards.title: Weeds on the big bend
hazards.brief: Stay right, but keep off the bank where oars can snag.

actors.label: Swimmer
actors.coach: Swimmer near the dock. Ease off and give extra room.

actors.label: Paddler
actors.coach: Public paddler ahead. Hold your line and avoid a late swerve.

actors.label: Oncoming shell
actors.coach: Oncoming shell. Both boats stay right for their direction of travel.

packs.name: M-14 Turn Drill
packs.summary: Stop downstream of M-14, execute a composed river turn, and return to the dock.
briefing: This is the short upstream drill north of the dock.
Do not drift under the M-14 bridge while setting up. Stop below it, then turn, cross, and clear.
Use it to rehearse the stop-cross-clear pattern before taking on the longer bridge sequence.

features.title: AARC Dock
features.brief: Launch and hold the right side of the river as you head north.

features.title: M-14 Bridge ahead
features.brief: The main pillars are ahead, but this drill turns below the bridge instead of crossing it.

features.title: M-14 turn box
features.brief: Stop below the bridge, cross the river, and turn back downstream to the dock.

actors.label: Oncoming shell
actors.coach: Oncoming shell. Stay right and keep the left side clear.

actors.label: Slow shell
actors.coach: Slow shell ahead on the return. Look, pass on the left, then come back right.

packs.name: Barton Bridge Run
packs.summary: Through the bridges to the high pedestrian bridge before Barton, then turn and come back through the same sequence.
briefing: This is the full technical drill: M-14, low park bridge, railroad bridge, and the high foot bridge before Barton.
Use the correct opening at each bridge and commit early. Late swerves are scored as mistakes even if you squeeze through.
Beyond the high bridge, stop, cross, turn back downstream, and thread the same sequence home.

features.title: M-14 Bridge
features.brief: Stay strictly between the two main pillars.

features.title: Park bridge (low)
features.brief: Maintain a composed center-right line and do not make a last-second correction under the bridge.

features.title: Railroad Bridge
features.brief: Use the right opening relative to your direction of travel and choose it early.

features.title: High foot bridge
features.brief: Take the inside of the pillar. The outer edge is shallow.

features.title: Barton turn box
features.brief: Just beyond the high bridge, stop, cross, and come back downstream through the bridges.

hazards.title: Outer shallow at the high bridge
hazards.brief: The outside edge of the high bridge is the shallow danger line.

actors.label: Oncoming shell
actors.coach: Oncoming shell. Stay right and do not let the lane drift open.

actors.label: Slow shell
actors.coach: Slow shell ahead. Pass on the left only if you have looked and the lane is clear.

actors.label: Paddler
actors.coach: Public paddler in the bridge corridor. Hold your line and avoid a late dart.

actors.label: Oncoming shell
actors.coach: Oncoming shell on the return. Keep your lane discipline all the way back to the dock.
